hard_gates: All required output sections must be present or semantically mappable.
All 5 interface items and all 4 harness joins must be covered without contradiction.
No source XML, upstream sidecar, harness packet, raw/private data, or secret material may be read, mutated, or claimed.
Readiness states must remain ceilings only, not final harness approval.
Previous harness candidate_safe status must not strengthen beyond the interface-control ceiling.
No fabricated source facts, hidden references, unsupported quantities, or name-similarity-only promotions.
quality_equivalence_checks: Total quality score must be at least 90.
Score must be at least 90% of the gpt-5.5/xhigh evaluator baseline score.
No critical section may lose material information compared with the baseline.
Blocked, review-required, source-gap, owner-followup, rerun-trigger, and boundary notes must be explicit rather than implied.
source_supported_possible may be represented as the stronger disjoint ceiling if its evidence basis makes candidate-safe conditions explicit or otherwise preserves the no-blocker reasoning.
scoring_notes: Prefer stable machine-readable structured fields over mostly prose.
Prefer separate item-level and join-level reasoning.
Prefer narrow source rerun triggers and owner follow-up routes.
Treat code-fenced JSON as semantically mappable but slightly weaker than plain JSON for machine-readability.
Treat major over-production as a cost/usability penalty even when quality passes.
